import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let text = match line
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut product = 1
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut negative = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(text)
  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(text, i)
    let b = match b_opt
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has_digit
        if negative
          product = product * (-current)
        else
          product = product * current
        end
      end
      current = 0
      has_digit = false
      negative = false
    else if b == 45
      negative = true
    else if b == 43
      negative = false
    else
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    if negative
      product = product * (-current)
    else
      product = product * current
    end
  end
  println("product=#{product}")
end
